edges.evidence_quote: the family was one of three centralized organized crime organizations in Hamilton, with the other two being the Luppino crime family and the Papalia crime family
edges.context: The Musitano family is one of three centralized crime families in Hamilton, alongside Luppino and Papalia.

edges.evidence_quote: the family was one of three centralized organized crime organizations in Hamilton, with the other two being the Luppino crime family and the Papalia crime family
edges.context: The Musitano family is one of three centralized crime families in Hamilton, alongside Luppino and Papalia.

edges.evidence_quote: Unlike the other two Hamilton families, the Musitanos did not form a strong alliance with the Buffalo crime family
edges.context: The Musitanos did not form a strong alliance with the Buffalo crime family, unlike the other Hamilton families.

edges.evidence_quote: staying closer to their 'Ndrangheta cell
edges.context: The Musitano family stayed closer to their 'Ndrangheta cell, indicating affiliation.

edges.evidence_quote: it was affiliated with the 'ndrine Ruga and Aquilino
edges.context: The Musitano 'ndrina was affiliated with the Ruga 'ndrina in Italy during the 1980s.

edges.evidence_quote: it was affiliated with the 'ndrine Ruga and Aquilino
edges.context: The Musitano 'ndrina was affiliated with the Aquilino 'ndrina in Italy during the 1980s.

edges.evidence_quote: The Musitano family employed the Wild Ones biker gang, led by Walter Stadnick, as subcontractors to build and plant the bombs.
edges.context: The Musitano family employed the Wild Ones biker gang to build and plant bombs.

edges.evidence_quote: The Wild Ones disbanded in 1979 after five of their members were killed by the Hamilton chapter of the Outlaws over the course of 1978 and 1979.
edges.context: The Outlaws killed five Wild Ones members, leading to the Wild Ones disbanding.

edges.evidence_quote: Tony orchestrated the murder of Toronto mobster Domenic Racco of the Siderno Group, who violated their cocaine trade agreement by dealing behind Musitano's back
edges.context: The Musitano family had a cocaine trade agreement with the Siderno Group, which was violated by Racco.

edges.evidence_quote: Rizzuto formed an alliance with the Musitano brothers
edges.context: The Rizzuto family formed an alliance with the Musitano brothers to eliminate the Papalia family leaders.

edges.evidence_quote: the family ordered the hits of Johnny Papalia
edges.context: The Musitano family ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia, leader of the Papalia family.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family, Independent Soldiers, West End Gang, Hells Angels, Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan, Various other crime families and gangs
edges.context: The Independent Soldiers are listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family, Independent Soldiers, West End Gang, Hells Angels, Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan, Various other crime families and gangs
edges.context: The West End Gang is listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family, Independent Soldiers, West End Gang, Hells Angels, Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan, Various other crime families and gangs
edges.context: The Hells Angels are listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rizzuto crime family, Independent Soldiers, West End Gang, Hells Angels, Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan, Various other crime families and gangs
edges.context: The Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Luppino-Violi crime family, Papalia crime family, Various gangs over Canada including their allies
edges.context: The Luppino-Violi crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Luppino-Violi crime family, Papalia crime family, Various gangs over Canada including their allies
edges.context: The Papalia crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Murdock also claimed that he was waiting for Pat Musitano to approve the murders of four Luppino crime family members Natale Luppino and Vincenzo Luppino (the two sons of Giacomo Luppino) and Domenic Violi and Giuseppe Violi (the two sons of Paolo Violi).
edges.context: Musitano planned to murder Luppino family members to become godfather.

edges.evidence_quote: According to Murdock, the Musitano brothers had also been fed up with being a satellite (crew) of the Buffalo family and having to pay tribute money to the family.
edges.context: Musitano was a satellite crew of Buffalo family and resented paying tribute.

edges.evidence_quote: CBC News said that the 2013 death of Montreal mob boss Vito Rizzuto had 'left the Musitanos to fend for themselves.'
edges.context: Rizzuto family had been protectors of the Musitanos until Vito Rizzuto's death.

edges.evidence_quote: Court records from a 2018 matter against Domenico and Giuseppe 'Joe' Violi of the Luppino crime family discuss a claim that the Musitanos were supporting the Cuntrera-Caruana Mafia clan who have roots in Montreal and Toronto.
edges.context: Musitanos supported the Cuntrera-Caruana clan.
